text.title: langchain-basics Output Contract
text.summary: Extraction schema with `with_structured_output` and chain configuration envelope.

section.title: Structured Extraction Pydantic
section.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
class Extraction(BaseModel): entities: list[str] = Field(description="Named entities found in the input.") sentiment: str = Field(description="One of 'positive', 'neutral', 'negative'.") summary: str = Field(description="One-sentence summary.")

example.note: Closed-enum sentiment, non-empty summary, entity list.
Entities should be a list; sentiment is not a canonical value; summary is empty. Validator rejects.

list.item: Sentiment is an enum, not a free string.
Chain is defined at module level.
